# Contributing to Modern Web Guidance

This repository (`GoogleChrome/modern-web-guidance`) is a publish target.

If you would like to contribute guides, fix bugs, or improve the evaluation infrastructure, please do so at the source repository:

👉 **[GoogleChrome/modern-web-guidance-src](https://github.com/GoogleChrome/modern-web-guidance-src)**

All pull requests and issues should be opened there. Thank you! <3
